tool_input.command:
mv .venv.stale /tmp/tk-agent-team-stale-venv-$$ && \
  cd /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team && \
  echo "=== Final tree ===" && \
  find . -type f -not -path './mcp-servers/agent-substrate/.venv/*' -not -path './mcp-servers/agent-substrate/uv.lock' -not -path './logs/*' -not -path './.claude/data/*' -not -name '.DS_Store' | sort
tool_input.description: Stash stale venv out of tree, show final project layout
